oe_removals.reason: This moment is primarily focus management: Jordan parks a late-breaking topic, explains the boundary, and sets a follow-up. The trust dimension is not distinct enough from the deferral itself, so this is better captured under focus_management.

changes.reason: Misaligned to the pattern. The Vantage deferral is better captured as focus management; the note repackages that same behavior without adding a distinct trust consequence.
